content.rendered:
Embark on a spiritually enriching and culturally vibrant journey through Odisha’s Golden Heritage Circuit — Bhubaneshwar, Puri, and the famed Diamond Triangle of Ratnagiri, Lalitgiri, and Udayagiri.
This tour blends divine devotion, ancient history, and scenic tranquility — perfect for families, pilgrims, and history lovers alike.

Bhubaneshwar – The Temple City
Witness centuries of architectural grandeur at Lingaraj Temple, Mukteshwar Temple, and Rajarani Temple. Discover Odisha’s art, heritage, and soulful traditions.

Puri – The Abode of Lord Jagannath
Experience the divine aura of Shree Jagannath Temple, stroll along Puri Beach, and visit the sacred Gundicha Temple and Loknath Temple.

Konark – The Sun Temple Marvel
A UNESCO World Heritage Site, Konark Sun Temple showcases the brilliance of ancient Indian architecture and sculpture.

Diamond Triangle – Ratnagiri, Lalitgiri & Udayagiri
Explore the ancient Buddhist monasteries, stupas, and excavation sites forming the “Diamond Triangle” — a serene experience connecting spirituality with history.

description:
Classical Odisha: Bhubaneswar – Puri with Diamond Triangle
Step into the cultural heart of India with a journey through Classical Odisha, where ancient temples, spiritual heritage, and timeless traditions await. Begin in Bhubaneswar, the “Temple City of India,” dotted with exquisite Kalinga-style temples and rich history. Continue to the sacred town of Puri, home to the world-famous Jagannath Temple and golden beaches that draw pilgrims and travelers alike. The trip also covers the mystical Diamond Triangle – Ratnagiri, Lalitgiri, and Udayagiri – renowned Buddhist sites where monasteries, stupas, and sculptures narrate the story of Odisha’s Buddhist past. Along the way, experience Odisha’s vibrant culture, handicrafts, classical dance, and the serene beauty of Chilika Lake, making this journey a perfect blend of spirituality, history, and discovery.

faqs.title: 1. What are the main highlights of this tour?
faqs.content:
Bhubaneswar: Lingaraj Temple, Mukteshwar Temple, Khandagiri & Udayagiri Caves
Puri: Jagannath Temple, Puri Beach, Chilika Lake (Satpada)
Diamond Triangle: Ratnagiri, Lalitgiri, Udayagiri Buddhist complexes

faqs.title: 2. Is this package suitable for families and senior citizens?
faqs.content: Yes, the trip is designed for pilgrims, families, and history lovers. However, some sites involve walking/climbing steps.

faqs.title: 3. Do I need to follow any dress code for temple visits?
faqs.content: Modest attire is recommended while visiting temples (especially Jagannath Temple). Shoes are not allowed inside temple premises.

faqs.title: 7. What should I pack for this trip?
faqs.content: Light cotton clothes (winters require light woolens) Comfortable footwear for temple & cave visits Sunscreen, cap, sunglasses, personal medicines Valid government ID for hotel check-in
